methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 4 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Thoron is a seed-stage company operating in the Drones & Autonomous sector. The comparable universe consists of seven private companies in this space, including Joby Aviation, Nuro, Archer Aviation, Elroy Air, and Airship Industries. No public companies provide direct comparability. The sector remains nascent and heterogeneous, limiting the applicability of traditional valuation methods.

Peer-median analysis is not applicable to this valuation. While four same-sector peers exist, none satisfy the filtering criteria required for reliable triangulation—specifically, no peers match Thoron's seed stage, adjacent stage, or similar valuation tier simultaneously. This scarcity reflects the immature state of the Drones & Autonomous market and the wide dispersion in funding trajectories and valuations across portfolio companies. Using an all-sector median would introduce substantial noise and mask material differences in technology, go-to-market strategy, and capital efficiency across the peer set.

The absence of applicable quantitative methods means this valuation cannot be supported by standard triangulation. Any valuation of Thoron would require either: expansion of the comparable set through adjacent sectors (which risks category error), or reliance on fundamentals-based approaches (revenue multiples, cost-to-scale analysis) contingent on forward-looking operational data not provided here. The key uncertainty is whether the seven private peers themselves represent sufficiently homogeneous comparison points, or whether Thoron's specific technical approach and market positioning warrant treatment as a distinct category.
